---
title: "Open spatial science as routine practice: Urban Data/Code contributions from GISRUK 2024"
date: 2026-04-01
author:
  - name: Roger Beecham
    url: http://www.roger-beecham.com/
    orcid: 0000-0001-8563-7251
    affiliation: School of Geography, University of Leeds
  - name: Dani Arribas-Bel
    url: https://darribas.org
    orcid: 
    affiliation: Department of Geography & Planning, University of Liverpool
categories: 
  - reproducibility
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Roger Beecham</strong> and Dani Arribas-Bel (2026) “Open spatial science as routine practice: Urban Data/Code contributions from GISRUK 2024”, <em>Environment & Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science</em>, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083261431404"><code>10.1177/23998083261431404</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083261431404
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
haiku:
---
## Important links

- [Paper (OpenAccess)](https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083261431404)


## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{beecham_gridmappr_2025,
	author = {Roger Beecham and Dani Arribas-Bel},
	doi = {10.1177/23998083261431404},
	publisher={Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science},
	title={Open spatial science as routine practice: Urban Data/Code contributions from GISRUK 2024},
  volume = {53},
  number = {3},
  pages = {482--486},
	year = {2026}
	}
```
